_comment: Canonical Anthropic /v1/oauth/token response shape. RFC 6749 token endpoint format. Anvil's exchange_oauth_code parser MUST handle all required fields (scope, expires_in) or refuse to write credentials. Mismatched parser is the root cause of task #595: bearer accepted by Anvil but Anthropic rejects with 401 Invalid authentication credentials because stored token metadata is empty. Daily CC parity check: diff this fixture against current Claude Code (~/.claude/projects/-Users-soulofall-projects/memory/feedback-claude-code-parity.md) and Anvil's current parser.
